announcements.title: sf-pi v0.180.0 — sf-browser: extend navigation hardening harness to all surfaces
announcements.body: sf-browser: extend navigation hardening harness to all surfaces — docs: keep README pi floor at >=0.76.0 to match package.json

announcements.title: sf-pi requires pi 0.73 or newer
announcements.body: Current sf-pi builds require pi 0.73 or newer. Run `pi update` before upgrading sf-pi; PI_CODING_AGENT_SESSION_DIR remains supported for relocating session storage.
